must_read.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment

must_read.title: OpenAI工程师不写代码了：AI写得太快，人类检查跟不上，Agent直接包办开发

must_read.title: Sorting algorithms

must_read.title: Replit Agent 4 Is Here: Plan, Design, and Build a Habit Tracking App with Multiple AI Agents

must_read.title: Code Concepts: A Large-Scale Synthetic Dataset Generated from Programming Concept Seeds
From Figma to Claude Code and back | Gui Seiz & Alex Kern (Figma)

must_read.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
must_read.why: 揭示了构建安全、可靠的 AI 智能体工作流所必需的核心防御机制，对开发者和企业部署 AI 应用具有重要的安全指导意义。

must_read.title: 腾讯混元团队最新研究：让 AI 从「固定模型」走向「实时适配系统」

must_read.title: .md 编译了个人认知，什么来编译企业的认知？
